title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Grant Thornton India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Grant Thornton India
jsonLd.description:
Grant Thornton India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Grant Thornton India:
Grant Thornton India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grant Thornton India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
